name: The Nightwatchman
description: '''The Nightwatchman''' is a solo project of the American musician [[Tom Morello]] who is known for his memberships in [[Rage Against the Machine]], [[Street Sweeper Social Club]] and [[Audioslave]]. Morello began performing as the Nightwatchman in 2003 as an outlet for his political views while he was playing [[wikt:apolitical|apolitical]] music with Audioslave.
